title: Local Approval Review Bundle Export
objective: Add a browser-local approval review bundle export that combines the PM approval dry-run envelope and readiness checkpoint without sending a live approval POST, creating an approval row, or mutating project/import state.
scope: Add an Export Review Bundle action to the existing Local Approval Submission Dry Run panel.
Download one JSON artifact that includes the dry-run approval envelope, readiness checkpoint, included artifact filenames, review sequence, live-write gate text, and blocked boundaries.
Keep the export local-only and informational.
Extend the focused Playwright smoke to prove the downloaded review bundle and zero mutation requests.
not_allowed: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No secret access or secret rotation.
No backend route or mutation route change.
No project import, workpackage rows, task rows, apparatus rows, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking, workbook macro, or workbook writeback.
No service, auth, DNS, ingress, or control-plane widening.

live_write_gate.required_phrase: I explicitly admit PM Lane 142 live approval POST and first approval-row creation for the current Project Miner Temp Power import candidate.
live_write_gate.note: This phrase was not present for PM Lane 146, so the lane remains local review-bundle export only.

validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 146|Export Review Bundle|approval-review-bundle|pm_lane_146_local_review_bundle_v1|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS: operations-web typecheck passed, operations-web production build passed, focused PM import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed, packet JSON parsed, guardrail search confirmed PM Lane 146/review-bundle/zero-mutation evidence plus NETA Topic Spine/TCC parked language, and git diff --check passed.
sidecar_result: No new Desktop Codex execution was needed. Existing NETA Topic Spine Comparative Audit prompt remains the next optional non-PM side-lane handoff if Jason admits it.
next_recommended_lane: PM lane may continue local operator-review ergonomics or await explicit PM Lane 142 live-write admission; Desktop Codex may receive the NETA Topic Spine Comparative Audit prompt if Jason admits that side lane.
